name: Get Douyin video comment replies with JustOneAPI

parameters.content:
## Get Douyin video comment replies with JustOneAPI

### How it works

1. Trigger workflow manually
2. Prepare API and comment parameters
3. Fetch Douyin video comments
4. Select first comment with replies
5. Check if comment has ID
6. If yes: fetch and process replies
7. If no: build empty reply output
8. Output final results

### Setup steps

- - [ ] Configure JustOneAPI credentials in HTTP Request nodes
- - [ ] Set Douyin video ID in 'Prepare API and Comment Inputs' node
- - [ ] Verify API endpoints in both HTTP Request nodes

### Customization

You can modify the comment selection logic in 'Select First Comment With Replies' to handle different reply retrieval scenarios.

## Workflow Trigger

Initial manual trigger to start the workflow

## Input Preparation

Prepares API parameters and comment selection criteria

## Fetch Douyin Comments

Makes API call to retrieve video comments

## Comment Selection

Identifies first comment with replies for further processing

## Comment Validation

Checks if selected comment has valid ID for reply retrieval

## Reply Processing Path

Main path for fetching and processing comment replies

## No Reply Path

Alternative path when no valid comment ID is found

## Raw Data Outputs

Optional outputs for raw API responses (debugging)
